rows.label: xs33170100_MSG0020
rows.name:
We cannot pinpoint the cause of the radio interference.
We still can't even confirm our surroundings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33170100_MSG0030
rows.name: What about communications with the assault team?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33170100_MSG0050
rows.name: They might just be unable to get a signal through.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33170100_MSG0060
rows.name: Do not neglect hailing them from our side.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33170100_MSG0080
rows.name: We have no choice but to trust them and wait.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33170100_MSG0110
rows.name: I just thought those were unusually reliable words coming from you.[ST:wait ]
